name: griot-grits
description: Griot and Grits skill collection for Claude Code

plugins.name: griot-grits
plugins.description: Skills for the Griot and Grits interview preservation workflow: generate publication-ready metadata from transcripts (video-interview.create-metadata), upload interviews to YouTube (video-interview.upload), and create branded Instagram/Facebook posts with share-forward captions and a $20/month donate ask (video-interview.create-social-media-post).
